overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player navigating a hazy, neon-lit urban downtown district at dusk. The player crosses a busy intersection, walks along covered sidewalks past vending machines and shops, then observes a massive megabuilding under construction before continuing down the street.

events.description: begins walking forward from stationary position at crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at crosswalk then walking across the intersection toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck waiting at the intersection
purple sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: large white box truck with flatbed parked at intersection
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
multiple large digital advertisements on building facade displaying anime-style characters
tall building with reflective glass windows

segments.scene_description: The player begins at a city intersection during hazy dusk, with a white delivery truck to the left and holographic billboards visible ahead. After a brief pause, the player starts walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk as a purple sedan passes through the intersection.

events.description: turns right onto sidewalk leaving the crosswalk behind

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a green apartment building

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: multi-story green residential building with balconies and external air conditioning units
green metal railing separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player turns onto a concrete sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing on the left and a tall green apartment building on the right. The holographic billboards shift to the left as the player proceeds forward, following a pedestrian ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overhang

events.description: enters shaded area under building overhang, reducing natural light and increasing neon illumination
approaches vending machines and shop fronts along the covered walk

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang following other pedestrians past shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in long coat walking ahead on the sidewalk
second pedestrian walking alongside the first

entered.detail: concrete overhang providing cover over the sidewalk with exposed pipes and wiring
traditional Japanese-style red paper lanterns hanging from building exterior
bright yellow vending machine with holographic display and Japanese text
stairs leading up to building entrance with metal handrails

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered walkway beneath a building overhang, where the lighting shifts to artificial neon glow. Red paper lanterns hang on the right while a yellow vending machine appears on the left. The player follows two pedestrians ahead, passing concrete stairs leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon view of megabuilding under construction

events.description: tilts camera upward to observe the megabuilding under construction
pans camera back down to street level

agents.ego_description: standing still or moving slowly while looking up at the towering construction site, then returning gaze to street level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat walking past as camera returns to street level

entered.detail: massive cylindrical skyscraper with exposed scaffolding and incomplete upper floors
multiple construction cranes mounted atop the unfinished building
large industrial air conditioning unit with visible fan on building exterior
tall palm tree in concrete planter on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player tilts the camera upward to admire a massive megabuilding under construction, surrounded by cranes and set against a hazy orange sky. For an extended period, the view focuses on the towering architecture and surrounding buildings. Finally, the camera returns to street level, revealing a palm tree and a passing pedestrian as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a hazy urban district that transitions from an open city intersection into a dense, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins at a crosswalk during a hazy dusk, moving past a white delivery truck and holographic billboards as a purple sedan glides through the intersection. As the camera reaches the other side, the scene shifts onto a concrete sidewalk bordered by a green railing and a tall apartment building, following a pedestrian forward. The environment then closes in as the player enters a covered walkway, where the natural light gives way to an artificial neon glow featuring red paper lanterns and a yellow vending machine. Finally, the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive megabuilding under construction against an orange sky before returning to street level to pass a palm tree and a final pedestrian.
